name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: You can now set your own nationality — look for the "My nationality" box on the console (works for both master and manager).
Added Thailand (TH) to the nationality list.
Needs a one-time database update from the owner (migration-010.sql then migration-011.sql) before nationality can be saved.
